name: Three Milk Cake (Pastel Tres Leches Aldaco)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease a 9-inch round cake pan.
3. In a medium bowl, mix together flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
4. In another bowl, lightly stir eggs, milk, and vanilla.
5. Mix the wet ingredients with the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
6. Pour batter into the prepared cake pan and bake for about 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from oven and let cool for 15 minutes.
8. Turn off heat and carefully remove cake from pan so it doesn't stick.
9. Let cool completely before proceeding.
10. When cooled, cut horizontally with a long-bladed knife to create two layers.
11. To make the milk mixture, combine evaporated milk, sweetened condensed milk, whole milk (from empty can), vanilla, and rum in a large bowl or blender. Blend until smooth.
12. Place one cake layer on a serving dish with a rim. Pour enough milk mixture over the bottom layer to soak it well.
13. Carefully place the top layer of cake back on the soaked bottom layer.
14. Slowly pour more milk mixture over the top, allowing each layer to absorb the liquid before adding more.
15. Allow the cake to soak in the milk mixture for at least 2 hours in the refrigerator (soaking overnight is even better).
16. Once fully soaked, cut into pie-shaped wedges and garnish with chopped pecans or a sprinkle of cinnamon.
17. If there is any leftover milk mixture, pour it into a small pitcher and serve alongside the dessert.
